input.background: Determine whether each of the studies described in Exercises 2.4 are experimental or nonexperimental.
input.question: Explain your reasoning for study (b).

study_type.description: The type of study being conducted, either experimental or nonexperimental.

reasoning.value: Explanation for why the study is classified as experimental or nonexperimental.
reasoning.description: The reasoning or criteria used to determine the study type.
